= cos


Calculates the cosine of a given angle specified in radians.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.new_value = (this.value * (pi() / 180)).cos()

# In:  {"value":45}
# Out: {"new_value":0.7071067811865476}

# In:  {"value":0}
# Out: {"new_value":1}

# In:  {"value":180}
# Out: {"new_value":-1}
----
